title: Systasis to Helios (Establishing a Relationship with the Sun God)
text:
Come, come to me from the four winds of the world, air-transversing, great god. Hear me in every ritual which I perform, and grant all the petitions of my prayer completely, because I know your signs, symbols and forms, who you are each hour and what your name is.

Hourly forms of Helios:
1st hour: form of a young monkey — tree: silver fir — stone: aphanos — name: PHROUER
2nd hour: form of a unicorn — tree: persea — stone: pottery stone — bird: halouchakon — land: ichneumon — name: BAZETOPHOTH
3rd hour: form of a cat — tree: fig tree — stone: samouchos — bird: parrot — land: frog — name: AKRAMMACHAMAREI
4th hour: form of a bull... [continues through all 12 hours]
procedure: Know the signs, symbols, and forms of Helios for each hour
Invoke at the appropriate hour with the correct form and name
The appearance of your own shadow is the proof of Helios' presence
notes: The systasis (establishment of a relationship) with Helios is a foundational theurgic practice. The appearance of one's shadow (PGM III.612–632) is the proof of Helios' presence. This spell forms a sequence with the shadow-control rite that follows. The hourly forms and names give the practitioner precise imaginal coordinates for the encounter.

catalog_entry.title: Spell to establish a relationship with Helios
